visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A group of five young adults, including a central man in a black jacket and a woman in a green hoodie, are visible praying. They hold bundles of burning incense sticks, performing synchronized bowing motions toward the temple altar. The setting is the interior of a traditional temple featuring a bright red ceiling and intricately carved stone pillars. Yellow subtitles appear at the bottom. (2) Two young women wearing white face masks wave their hands enthusiastically and clap for the camera in an outdoor setting. The background consists of a flat urban parking lot with several silver cars parked behind a red and white gate. The lighting is natural, bright daylight. A white heart and the character '爺' appear as variety text overlays on their faces. (3) In a close-up shot focusing on hands, a person is seen placing individual snack packages and a white sheet of paper onto a series of red plastic offering trays. The objects include crackers, juice cartons, and a metal tabletop. The environment remains the temple interior, though the background is blurred to emphasize the objects. Subtitles tracking the dialogue appear. (4) A young woman with long dark hair and a black jacket is seen arranging and unfolding two large white sheets of paper on a metal table. In the background, numerous red lanterns hang from the ceiling, and stacks of yellow spirit paper are visible. The scene uses a medium shot with eye-level perspective. A variety text tag is displayed.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 祈求土地公爺爺能夠. (2) [Subtitle]: 保佑哈佛的員工都可以. (3) [Subtitle]: 中大獎. (4) [Variety]: 爺❤. (5) [Variety]: 爺❤保佑我們. (6) [Slogan]: 2025儲備幹部招募. (7) [Subtitle]: 要給土地公爺爺看我們的名單. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後壓著?. (9) [Variety]: (來自拜拜老手的指導). (10) [Subtitle]: 要面對他打開. (11) [Subtitle]: 兩張分開. (12) [Subtitle]: 對. (13) [Subtitle]: 大家都很會. (14) [Subtitle]: 不然怎麼上台大. (15) [Variety]: OH. (16) [Slogan]: 時間快轉到尾牙後. (17) [Variety]: 莎莎的小發現. (18) [Subtitle]: 那個都市傳說. (19) [Subtitle]: 莎莎的小發現. (20) [Subtitle]: 觀察到. (21) [Subtitle]: 喔我們上次. (22) [Subtitle]: 有買巧克力的. (23) [Subtitle]: 都沒抽中. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後吃了很多巧克力的. (25) [Subtitle]: 也沒有抽中. (26) [Subtitle]: 我們原本只是期待就是. (27) [Subtitle]: 希望可以很多人中. (28) [Subtitle]: 阿沒想到. (29) [Subtitle]: 去年老闆來這邊拜. (30) [Subtitle]: 去年老闆來這邊拜. (31) [Subtitle]: 結果. (32) [Subtitle]: 工作室整個就是. (33) [Subtitle]: 一敗塗地. (34) [Subtitle]: 殺得我們片甲不留啊. (35) [Subtitle]: 今年想說. (36) [Subtitle]: 阿好啊我們來試試看. (37) [Subtitle]: 我們今年來拜一下好了. (38) [Variety]: !!!!!. (39) [Subtitle]: 一拜不得了啊. (40) [Subtitle]: 大家看那個正片. (41) [Subtitle]: 請去看正片. (42) [Subtitle]: 我們嚇到. (43) [Subtitle]: 我們在. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Around 5 people appear across different temple and outdoor scenes, with 3 being central speakers.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One man with short hair in a black jacket and later a plaid shirt, one woman with long hair in a gray hoodie, and one man with curly hair and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a traditional temple with red ceilings, stone pillars, and ritual offerings. Outdoor urban streets and parking lots with vehicles and buildings.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A dominant male voice recites a prayer in Mandarin with moderate pitch and a respectful, calm delivery style. The background music is a light, upbeat synthesizer track with a steady 120 BPM tempo, providing a cheerful yet subtle texture. There are no prominent sound effects, and the ambient noise is a clean studio-like silence. (2) The audio shifts to a high-arousal segment where multiple female and male voices cheer 'Yeah!' and shout celebratory greetings. The intensity is high, with voices sounding projected and excited. A brief 'whoosh' transition sound effect punctuates the scene change. Ambient noise includes a faint outdoor urban hum with low-level traffic sounds in the background. (3) A female voice takes over with a friendly, animated tone, explaining the process of presenting a list to the deity. The music remains a consistent background bed of electronic pop. Audible incidental noises include the crisp rustling of paper being handled. The signal-to-noise ratio is excellent, with the speech clearly separated from the background layers. (4) A male voice tells a humorous anecdote about urban legends and chocolate, featuring a fast speech rate and dramatic, high-variability pitch contours. The music track is continuous, while several post-production sound effects like a 'ding' and 'cartoon pop' are used for comedic emphasis. The editing pace is fragmented, reflecting a rapid-fire social-media production style.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Action -> Narrative Setup -> Comedic Climax
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A lighthearted vlog chronicling a group's visit to a temple to pray for luck during the year-end season. It uses a blend of documentary-style temple footage and reflective, high-energy talking-head segments to contrast their serious prayers with humorous anecdotes about past failures and urban legends.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video blends ritualistic temple footage with contemporary social-media vlog elements, using meme-style SFX and high-energy vocal delivery to engage a young audience.
